items.prompt: In AVP, every trajectory event carries the same `source` value identifying the producer. Respond with ONLY a JSON object of the form {"answer": "<value>"} and nothing else.
Which AVP v0.1 trajectory event type closes a run (the final lifecycle event)? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<event_type>"}.
Which AVP v0.1 trajectory event type carries the per-turn token usage and cost? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<event_type>"}.
In the avp CLI, which scorer name grades ParseBench table-extraction fidelity? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<scorer-name>"}.
What is the HuggingFace dataset id used by the avp ParseBench example? Respond with ONLY {"answer": "<dataset-id>"}.
Write a valid AVP Commission as a single JSON object that runs the model anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5 and enables ONLY the built-in tool named shell. Output ONLY the JSON object, no prose.
